settings.title: Workspace Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your team and workspace permissions.

general.title: General Basics
general.adminOnly: Only admins can change the workspace name.

members.title: Workspace Members
members.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{email}} from the workspace?
members.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this invitation? The user will no longer be able to join using this link.

invite.title: Invite Team Member
invite.restrictedDesc: Only Workspace Owners and Admins can invite new members. Your current role is {{role}}.

owner.title: Owner
owner.desc: Full access, payment control, and workspace deletion.

admin.title: Admin
admin.desc: Can manage members, jobs, and all data.

editor.title: Editor
editor.desc: Can create/edit jobs and candidates. Cannot manage members.

viewer.title: Viewer
viewer.desc: Read only access. Cannot modify data.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteDesc: Deleting this workspace will remove all members from it. This action cannot be undone.
danger.lastWorkspaceNote: Note: Since this is your last workspace, deleting it will reset your account and create a fresh, empty workspace.
danger.leaveDesc: Leaving this workspace will immediately revoke your access to its data and candidates. To return, you will need to request a new invitation from an administrator.
danger.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this workspace? You will lose access immediately, and you will need to be re-invited to join again.
danger.ownerLeaveError: The owner cannot leave the workspace. You must delete the workspace or transfer ownership first.
danger.deleteConfirm: Are you absolutely sure? All jobs and candidates tied to this workspace will become orphaned or deleted!
danger.deleteConfirmOnly: ⚠️ DANGER: This is your ONLY workspace! Deleting it will wipe all your visible data. A fresh, empty "My Workspace" will be created for you upon reload. Are you absolutely sure?

activity.title: Extended Activity Logs
activity.subtitle: A complete audit trail of recent changes in your workspace.
activity.empty: No activity logs found for this workspace.
activity.emptyHint: As you add jobs, candidates, or team members, logs will appear here.

messages.INVITATION_ACCEPTED: accepted the workspace invitation to join as {{role}}

user.title: Account Settings
user.subtitle: Manage your personal profile and email notification preferences.

notifications.title: Email Notifications
notifications.desc: Stay updated on your hiring pipeline. Turn these off to reduce inbox noise.

welcome.title: Welcome & Tips
welcome.desc: Introductory emails and tips for getting started.

invite.title: Workspace Invitations
invite.desc: When you are invited to join a new workspace.

newJob.title: New Job Openings
newJob.desc: When a team member posts a new job in your workspace.

newCandidate.title: New Candidates
newCandidate.desc: When a new candidate is added to your active jobs.

pipeline.title: Pipeline Changes
pipeline.desc: When a candidate's stage is updated in the pipeline.
